sessions.title: WICO us5 app-create failing — CDC UpdateGroup latency
sessions.summary: Traced us5 API test app-creation timeout to CDC admin.updateGroup on admin.us1.gigya.com responding in ~40s vs our 30s Orleans grain timeout. Failing line: UserCredentialsGrain.cs:106 in CDP/ApplicationService. Corrected host misconception (admin.us1 not admin.us5 — CDC uses PrimaryRegion mapping). Slack draft ready for CDC infra.
outcomes: Root cause: CDC admin.updateGroup latency, not CDP bug
Full call chain traced from Gator POST through 5 grain hops
Slack draft saved with correct host admin.us1.gigya.com and endpoint admin.updateGroup
New memory rule: Orleans timeout logs fire on caller, real hang is deeper — follow Dropping expired message WARN
